details.test: Task 1: Add two multivitamins under $25 to cart via category flow
Task 2: Start guest checkout with cheapest matching search result
Task 3: Build bundle from vitamins category and apply IMMUNE10 coupon
Task 4: Compare two multivitamins and add higher-servings product to wishlist
Task 5: Attempt subscription-style add for most-reviewed product under $35
Task 6: Search with dietary filters, add second best-selling product (qty 2) and choose standard shipping
Task 7: Build mixed-form bundle and increase quantity of cheaper item to 2
Task 8: Find fastest-delivery product under $20 with high rating (adapted) and add to cart
Task 9: Brand flow – newest under $25, add and set quantity to 3
